bar_3d: The image shows one perspective 3D bar chart with category labels on the front axis, colored series labels in the legend, and integer value labels on the bars.

series_total_value: What is the total value for series {series_label} across all displayed categories?
Add every bar for series {series_label}; what total do you get?
Using the legend to find {series_label}, compute its total across all front-axis categories.
Across all category labels, what is the sum of the bars for series {series_label}?
What is the displayed category-wide total for series {series_label}?
category_total_value: What is the total value across all series for category {category_label}?
Add every series bar at category {category_label}; what total do you get?
For category {category_label}, compute the sum over all colored series.
At front-axis category {category_label}, what is the total of all bars?
What is the displayed series-wide total for category {category_label}?
series_interval_total_value: For series {series_label}, what is the total from category {start_category_label} through {end_category_label}, inclusive?
Using front-axis order, add series {series_label} from {start_category_label} to {end_category_label}; what is the total?
What is the inclusive interval total for series {series_label} between {start_category_label} and {end_category_label}?
Find series {series_label} and sum its bars from {start_category_label} through {end_category_label}.
Across the displayed category interval {start_category_label} to {end_category_label}, what total belongs to series {series_label}?
series_total_gap_value: What is the absolute difference between the total for series {series_label_a} and the total for series {series_label_b}?
Add each displayed category for {series_label_a} and {series_label_b}; what is the absolute gap between the two totals?
Across all categories, how far apart are the totals for {series_label_a} and {series_label_b}?
Compute the total for {series_label_a}, compute the total for {series_label_b}, then give their absolute difference.
What total-value gap separates series {series_label_a} and {series_label_b}?
category_total_gap_value: What is the absolute difference between the total for category {category_label_a} and the total for category {category_label_b}?
Add all series at {category_label_a} and at {category_label_b}; what is the absolute gap between those totals?
Across the two categories {category_label_a} and {category_label_b}, how far apart are their series totals?
Compute the total at {category_label_a}, compute the total at {category_label_b}, then give their absolute difference.
What total-value gap separates categories {category_label_a} and {category_label_b}?
category_extremum_gap_value: Within category {category_label}, what is the difference between its highest and lowest series bar values?
For category {category_label}, find the highest and lowest series bars; what is their value gap?
At category {category_label}, subtract the lowest series value from the highest series value.
What is the highest-minus-lowest series value within category {category_label}?
Looking only at category {category_label}, what is the highest-minus-lowest bar value?
series_threshold_count: For series {series_label}, how many displayed categories have values {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Looking across categories for series {series_label}, count the bars with values {comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
How many category bars in series {series_label} are {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Using the legend to find {series_label}, count how many of its bars are {comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
Across the front-axis categories, how many bars for {series_label} have value {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
category_threshold_count: For category {category_label}, how many series have values {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Looking across series at category {category_label}, count the bars with values {comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
How many colored series bars in category {category_label} are {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
At front-axis category {category_label}, how many series values are {comparison_phrase} {threshold}?
Within category {category_label}, count the series bars whose values are {comparison_phrase} {threshold}.
pairwise_comparison_count: In how many categories is series {series_label_a} greater than series {series_label_b}?
Compare {series_label_a} and {series_label_b} category by category; in how many categories is {series_label_a} larger?
Across the front-axis categories, count where {series_label_a} has a higher bar than {series_label_b}.
How many category positions show {series_label_a} above {series_label_b}?
For the pair {series_label_a} and {series_label_b}, how many displayed categories have the first series higher than the second?

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Answer field: {answer_hint}.

Required answer format: {answer_hint}.

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

{json_example}

query:series_total_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:series_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points, one at the top-center point on each relevant bar included in the requested series total

query:category_total_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:category_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points, one at the top-center point on each relevant bar included in the requested category total

query:series_interval_total_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer total
query:series_interval_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points, one at the top-center point on each relevant bar included in the requested interval total

query:series_total_gap_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested nonnegative integer difference
query:series_total_gap_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each compared series label to the [x, y] top-center points on that series' bars across the displayed categories

query:category_total_gap_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested nonnegative integer difference
query:category_total_gap_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping each compared category label to the [x, y] top-center points on all series bars in that category

query:category_extremum_gap_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested nonnegative integer difference
query:category_extremum_gap_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "highest" and "lowest", each mapped to the [x, y] top-center point on the corresponding bar in the requested category

query:series_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:series_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points, one at the top-center point on each bar that satisfies the stated condition

query:category_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:category_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points, one at the top-center point on each bar that satisfies the stated condition

query:pairwise_comparison_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:pairwise_comparison_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the top-center point on the first series bar and the top-center point on the second series bar for one counted category; use [] if no categories match
